description: Configure the Oracle Database Resource Manager to manage workload for 'Order Entry' (high priority) and 'Reporting' (low priority) applications. Create a resource plan named 'STABILITY_PLAN' containing consumer groups 'CRITICAL_APP_CG' and 'BATCH_REPORT_CG'. The plan directives must guarantee 60% CPU to 'CRITICAL_APP_CG' (with an automatic switch to 'BATCH_REPORT_CG' if a call exceeds 60 seconds), 20% CPU to 'BATCH_REPORT_CG', and 20% CPU to 'OTHER_GROUPS', all at Management Level 1. Map 'APP_USER' to 'CRITICAL_APP_CG' and 'RPT_USER' to 'BATCH_REPORT_CG', granting them the required privileges to switch to these groups. Enable 'STABILITY_PLAN' as the active resource plan. Connect as SYSTEM (password: OraclePassword123).
